examples:
Command Example
cofense-search-reports max_matches=30 created_at="60 days" reported_at="60 days" reporter=5328
Context Example
{
"Cofense.Report": [
{
"ReportBody": "Good day


Please arrange to provide the best offer for below attached Purchase Order
The requirement for our green field project in Berghofen,Dortmund.
Kindly get back to us

 


1) Proforma invoice with bank details

2) Delivery date 

3) FOB/CIF Port

 

 
 
Regards,

kahn Gotze
Sales & Services Assistant
",
"ReportedAt": "2019-05-17T11:37:52.000Z",
name: cofense-search-reports

outputs.description: ID number of the report. Report.EmailAttachments Email attachments.
outputs.name: Report.ID

outputs.description: Email attachment ID. Report.Tags Report tags.
outputs.name: Report.EmailAttachments.id

outputs.description: Cluster ID number. Report.CategoryId Report category.
outputs.name: Report.ClusterId

outputs.description: Reporting time. Report.MatchPriority The highest match priority based on rule hits for the report.
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: Reporter ID. Report.Location Location of the report.
outputs.name: Report.ReporterId

outputs.description: Reporter email address. Report.SuspectFromAddress Suspect from address.
outputs.name: Report.Reporter

outputs.description: MD5 hash of the file. Report.Sha256 SHA256 hash of the file.
outputs.name: Report.Md5
